title: Pakuuni Pirates

The '''Pakuuni Pirates''' was the proper name for the criminal organizations formed from both [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] from the [[Pakuuni system/Legends|Pakuuni system]], around the same time of the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] which caused intergalactic trade there and nearby systems like [[Argoon system/Legends|Argoon]] to be difficult, some would say dangerous at best. [[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice-Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]], however, set up a new installation, outpost [[NL-1]], there from which he restored order to the system.

The Pakuuni Pirates decided to ally themselves with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|rebels]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] trying to restore their business in the [[Sector/Legends|Sector]].

Attempts to stop [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] from establishing and securing the new base through the use of both the Rebels and Pirates forces failed.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
